linapro-monitor-loginlog.description: Official source plugin for login-log persistence and governance.

messages.deleteAllHint: When selected, the date range is ignored and all login logs in the current permission scope are deleted.
messages.deleteRangeDescription: Select how to delete login logs. By default, logs are cleaned by date range; selecting all logs cleans every log in the current permission scope.
messages.deleteRangeRequired: Select a complete login log date range

linapro-monitor-loginlog.name: Monitoring - Login Logs

uninstall_blocked.retention_required: Login logs are still inside the required retention window. Export or expire them before uninstalling.

disable_blocked.audit_required: Tenant audit policy requires login logging to remain enabled.
